name: signingSign
title: Sign with Stored Key
description: Signs arbitrary hex-encoded bytes using a key stored in the signing service. The key is identified by public key and decrypted using the passphrase. Requires authentication via bearer token.

publicKey.description: Hex-encoded Ed25519 public key identifying the signing key

passphrase.description: Passphrase to decrypt the signing key

publicKey.description: Hex-encoded public key that produced the signature
